SELECT h3ExactEdgeLengthKm(index) AS exactEdgeLengthKm FROM hexagon_edges WHERE index IN (1310277011704381439, 1310277011704381440);
SELECT h3ExactEdgeLengthKm(index) AS exactEdgeLengthKm FROM (SELECT index FROM hexagon_edges WHERE index < 1310277011704381441) AS subquery;
SELECT MAX(h3ExactEdgeLengthKm(index)) AS maxEdgeLengthKm FROM hexagon_edges;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT DISTINCT h3ExactEdgeLengthKm(index) FROM hexagon_edges WHERE index > 1310277011704381438) AS distinct_edge_lengths;
WITH edge_length AS (SELECT h3ExactEdgeLengthKm(index) AS length FROM hexagon_edges) SELECT AVG(length) FROM edge_length;
CREATE TABLE edge_analysis AS SELECT index, h3ExactEdgeLengthKm(index) AS length FROM hexagon_edges;

SELECT a.index, b.index, a.length + b.length AS combinedLength FROM (SELECT index, h3ExactEdgeLengthKm(index) AS length FROM hexagon_edges) AS a JOIN (SELECT index, h3ExactEdgeLengthKm(index) AS length FROM hexagon_edges) AS b ON a.index != b.index;
SELECT h3ExactEdgeLengthKm(SUBSTRING(CONVERT(index, 'String'), 1, 18)) AS length FROM hexagon_edges WHERE LENGTH(CONVERT(index, 'String')) > 18;
